prompt: Create a dramatic vertical poster-style sports tribute for {argument name="athlete name" default="Lewis Hamilton"}, designed like a cinematic legacy montage with a dark, high-contrast, gold-and-black color grade, gritty smoke, sparks, stadium haze, and celebratory lighting. At the top, place a huge metallic distressed headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="LEWIS HAMILTON"}, with a bold gold subheadline beneath it reading “BEYOND SPEED. BEYOND LIMITS.” and a smaller white line below saying “A LEGEND IN MOTION.” The composition centers on a large, close-up hero portrait of the athlete in a modern black racing suit, shown from the chest up, facing slightly to the side with intense expression, detailed skin texture, braided hair, dramatic rim lighting, and visible sponsor-style logos across the suit. Build a collage around the central portrait using exactly 8 supporting elements: on the upper left, a childhood go-kart scene labeled “1995” with the caption “THE DREAM BEGINS”; below it, a single-seater junior formula car scene labeled “2003” with the caption “F1 IS CALLING”; below that, a victory celebration scene labeled “2008” with the caption “A STAR IS BORN” and a second line “FIRST WIN CANADIAN GP”; lower left, a racing portrait labeled “2013” with the caption “WORLD CHAMPION” and a second line “A NEW ERA”; center torso text block labeled “2014 – 2020” with the title “DOMINANCE” and three stat lines “7 WORLD TITLES”, “6 CONSTRUCTORS’ TITLES”, and “82 RACE WINS”; bottom center, a front-facing black Formula 1 car with number 44 emerging from shadows; upper right, a triumphant full-body figure raising a trophy overhead amid confetti; mid-right, a vertical achievements column titled “ACHIEVEMENTS” with exactly 5 laurel-wreathed stats reading “7× F1 WORLD CHAMPION”, “103 RACE WINS”, “104 POLE POSITIONS”, “197 PODIUM FINISHES”, and “7 BRITISH GP WINS”, followed by a final text callout “SIR” and the line “KNIGHTED FOR SERVICES TO MOTORSPORT”; lower right, a modern portrait of the athlete with hand over chest beside the caption “2021 & BEYOND” and the stacked text “STILL PUSHING. STILL INSPIRING. STILL WINNING.” Add 2 additional cars at the bottom edge: a red Formula 1 car on the lower left streaking diagonally with motion blur, and a smaller black Formula 1 car on the lower right. Place a centered quote near the bottom in white italic caps: {argument name="quote" default="I DON’T RACE TO BE SECOND. I RACE TO BE ONE OF A KIND."}, followed by a gold handwritten signature-style script reading {argument name="signature name" default="Lewis Hamilton"}. Finish with a footer slogan in spaced-out white capitals: “TALENT. DISCIPLINE. PASSION. PURPOSE.” and a final line beneath it: “LEWIS HAMILTON – MORE THAN A DRIVER. A MOVEMENT.” Use layered depth, sharp typography, premium magazine-poster layout, subtle British flag accents, realistic cars, photoreal faces, and an inspirational champion-documentary aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 为 {argument name="athlete name" default="Lewis Hamilton"} 创建一张戏剧性的竖版体育致敬海报，设计风格为电影感传奇蒙太奇，采用深色、高对比度的金黑配色，融入粗粝的烟雾、火花、体育场薄雾和庆典灯光。在顶部放置一个巨大的金属质感做旧标题 {argument name="headline text" default="LEWIS HAMILTON"}，下方配以醒目的金色副标题“BEYOND SPEED. BEYOND LIMITS.”，以及一行较小的白色文字“A LEGEND IN MOTION.”。构图中心为运动员的半身特写肖像，身穿现代黑色赛车服，侧身面对镜头，表情坚毅，皮肤纹理细腻，编织发型，带有戏剧性的轮廓光，赛车服上可见赞助商风格的标志。围绕中心肖像构建拼贴画，包含 8 个辅助元素：左上方为标注“1995”的童年卡丁车场景，配文“THE DREAM BEGINS”；下方为标注“2003”的单座初级方程式赛车场景，配文“F1 IS CALLING”；再下方为标注“2008”的胜利庆典场景，配文“A STAR IS BORN”及第二行文字“FIRST WIN CANADIAN GP”；左下方为标注“2013”的赛车肖像，配文“WORLD CHAMPION”及第二行文字“A NEW ERA”；躯干中心文字块标注“2014 – 2020”，标题为“DOMINANCE”，包含三行统计数据：“7 WORLD TITLES”、“6 CONSTRUCTORS’ TITLES”和“82 RACE WINS”；底部中心为一辆从阴影中驶出的 44 号黑色一级方程式赛车；右上方为在五彩纸屑中高举奖杯的胜利全身像；右中部为垂直成就栏，标题为“ACHIEVEMENTS”，包含 5 个带有月桂花环的统计数据：“7× F1 WORLD CHAMPION”、“103 RACE WINS”、“104 POLE POSITIONS”、“197 PODIUM FINISHES”和“7 BRITISH GP WINS”，随后是最后的文字呼吁“SIR”及一行文字“KNIGHTED FOR SERVICES TO MOTORSPORT”；右下方为运动员手扶胸口的现代肖像，旁边配文“2021 & BEYOND”及堆叠文字“STILL PUSHING. STILL INSPIRING. STILL WINNING.”。在底部边缘增加 2 辆赛车：左下角为一辆带有动态模糊、斜向冲刺的红色一级方程式赛车，右下角为一辆较小的黑色一级方程式赛车。在底部附近放置居中的白色斜体大写引语：{argument name="quote" default="I DON’T RACE TO BE SECOND. I RACE TO BE ONE OF A KIND."}，随后是金色的手写签名式字体 {argument name="signature name" default="Lewis Hamilton"}。最后以底部标语收尾，采用字间距拉开的白色大写字母：“TALENT. DISCIPLINE. PASSION. PURPOSE.”，下方为最后一行文字：“LEWIS HAMILTON – MORE THAN A DRIVER. A MOVEMENT.”。运用分层深度、锐利排版、高级杂志海报布局、微妙的英国国旗元素、写实赛车、照片级人脸以及励志冠军纪录片美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影感赛车传奇海报：此提示词可生成极具戏剧性的传记式赛车致敬海报，包含核心人物肖像、里程碑时间轴场景、赛车以及成就统计数据，适用于励志体育品牌推广或同人艺术创作。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, full-body, poster layout, front-facing, callout, layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, documentary, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
